input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.1.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.1.4
            TITLE: an inspection hole approximately 4mm in diameter must be drilled through a low stress

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.1.4: An inspection hole approximately 4mm in diameter must be drilled through a low stress
F.7.1.4 An inspection hole approximately 4mm in diameter must be drilled through a low stress 
location of every monocoque section regulated by the Structural Equivalency Spreadsheet  
This inspection hole is not required in the Vertical Side Impact Structure  F.7.5.3.b
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 40 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: An inspection hole approximately 4mm in diameter must be drilled through a low stress location of every monocoque section regulated by the Structural Equivalency Spreadsheet This inspection hole is not required in the Vertical Side Impact Structure
